# Processed Data Directory

Cleaned and processed datasets are saved here.

## Generated Files

After running the notebooks, you'll have:

- `merged_final_cleaned.csv` - Cleaned dataset (from notebook 02)
- `merged_final_engineered.csv` - With engineered features (from notebook 04)
- `clustered_data.csv` - With regime assignments (from notebook 05)

## Usage

These files are generated automatically by the notebooks.
They're excluded from Git to save space.
